title: T-014 — LOTO apply/clear Server Actions + two-person e-sign (D-MNT-15, V-MNT-07..09, Wave1 T-124)
prompt:
# T-014 — LOTO apply/clear Server Actions with e-sign

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §7.2 D-MNT-15, §8.1 (loto_pre_execution_gate_v1), §11.2 (V-MNT-07..09), §9.7 (mwo_loto_checklists)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `applyLoto` and `clearLoto` Server Actions enforcing two-person verification (V-MNT-08/09) via Wave1 T-124 e-sign primitive. Apply records energy isolations + verifier; Clear requires distinct second-person e-sign + released_by.

## Pre-flight
Verify Wave1 T-124 e-sign primitive interface (`packages/auth/src/e-sign.ts` or similar). Verify T-004 (mwo_loto_checklists table), T-001 (mnt.loto.apply, mnt.loto.clear perms).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/loto.ts`:
   - `applyLoto({mwoId, energySources[], tagsApplied[], verifierPin, verifierUserId})` — V-MNT-08 verifier role check (maintenance_technician OR maintenance_manager); calls e-sign primitive to verify PIN against verifierUserId; on success writes `mwo_loto_checklists` row with `zero_energy_verified_by=verifierUserId`, `verified_at=now()`, `energy_sources_isolated`, `tags_applied`; emits outbox `loto.applied` event.
   - `clearLoto({mwoId, releaserPin, releaserUserId})` — V-MNT-09 `released_by != verified_by` (warn-level; advise but DO NOT hard-block per V-MNT-09 wording "warn, best practice" — but production critical-asset configuration may upgrade to block: read `maintenance_settings.loto_two_person_strict` toggle; if true → block, else → warn-only); validates releaser PIN; updates `released_at=now()`, `released_by=releaserUserId`; emits outbox `loto.cleared`.
2. Both actions use `db.transaction()` with `SELECT … FOR UPDATE` on mwo_loto_checklists row.
3. RBAC: applyLoto requires `mnt.loto.apply`; clearLoto requires `mnt.loto.clear`.
4. Vitest with Testcontainers + mocked e-sign: V-MNT-08 verifier role enforced; PIN-fail rejects; second-person policy default warn / strict block; concurrent clear serialised.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/loto.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/loto.schema.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/__tests__/loto.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given applyLoto with verifierUserId whose role is NOT maintenance_technician AND NOT maintenance_manager, when called, then fails `LOTO_VERIFIER_ROLE_INVALID` (V-MNT-08).
2. Given applyLoto with wrong verifierPin, when called, then fails `LOTO_PIN_INVALID` (e-sign verifier rejects).
3. Given clearLoto with releaserUserId === zero_energy_verified_by AND `maintenance_settings.loto_two_person_strict=true`, when called, then fails `LOTO_TWO_PERSON_RULE` (V-MNT-09 strict).
4. Given clearLoto with releaserUserId === zero_energy_verified_by AND strict=false (default), when called, then succeeds but returns `warnings: ['V-MNT-09: same-person clear advised against']` and emits outbox `loto.cleared` with `warnings` field.
5. Given applyLoto succeeds, when outbox is queried, then row event_type='loto.applied' with payload {mwo_id, verifier_user_id, energy_sources_isolated, tags_applied, verified_at}.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest asserting all five ACs with Testcontainers + mocked e-sign primitive.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/__tests__/loto.test.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not store raw PIN — e-sign primitive (Wave1 T-124) handles hashing.
- Do not bypass V-MNT-08 verifier role check — safety-critical.
- Do not silently accept same-person clear without warnings in non-strict mode.
- Do not skip outbox emission — 12-reporting LOTO Compliance dashboard depends on `loto.*` events.
- Do not enforce strict two-person without reading `maintenance_settings.loto_two_person_strict` toggle (config-driven per §13).

pipeline_inputs.description: applyLoto + clearLoto Server Actions with Wave1 T-124 e-sign two-person verification; V-MNT-07..09 enforcement.
pipeline_inputs.details: Safety-critical. Uses Wave1 T-124 e-sign primitive (mandatory per task brief). Two-person strict toggle config-driven.
acceptance_criteria: Given applyLoto with verifierUserId whose role is NOT maintenance_technician AND NOT maintenance_manager, when called, then fails LOTO_VERIFIER_ROLE_INVALID (V-MNT-08); given wrong verifierPin, then fails LOTO_PIN_INVALID via e-sign primitive T-124

Given clearLoto with same-person + strict=true, when called, then fails LOTO_TWO_PERSON_RULE (V-MNT-09 strict); given strict=false (default), then succeeds with warnings array and outbox loto.cleared row has warnings field
Given applyLoto succeeds, when outbox is queried, then loto.applied event payload contains {mwo_id, verifier_user_id, energy_sources_isolated, tags_applied, verified_at}
Given applyLoto runs in a DB transaction with SELECT FOR UPDATE on mwo_loto_checklists, when concurrent apply is attempted, then only one succeeds and verified_at is set exactly once
test_strategy: RED: vitest with Testcontainers + mocked e-sign asserting all five ACs
risk_red_lines: Do not store raw PIN — use Wave1 T-124 e-sign primitive
Do not bypass V-MNT-08 verifier role check
Do not silently accept same-person clear without warnings
Do not skip outbox emission (12-reporting LOTO dashboard)
Do not hardcode strict two-person — config-driven via maintenance_settings.loto_two_person_strict
